{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Dreadgod armor
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dreadgod armor]] manifested around [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Dreadgod armor]] can break before fifteen [[Silverlords]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
